nasb.text: So Moses sent them from the wilderness of Paran at the command of the Lord, all of them men who were heads of the sons of Israel.

esv.text: So Moses sent them from the wilderness of Paran, according to the command of the Lord, all of them men who were heads of the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 摩西就照著耶和華的吩咐，從巴蘭的曠野派他們去了；他們都是以色列人的領袖。

ccb.text: 摩西就按耶和华的吩咐，从巴兰旷野派出了十二位首领。
